ai.title: Val Kilmer resurrected with AI in new As Deep as the Grave trailer
ai.description: A new trailer for As Deep as the Grave shows an AI-generated depiction of Val Kilmer. The Top Gun actor died aged 65 in 2025 from pneumonia. He had been diagnosed with throat cancer in 2014, which he recovered from, his daughter confirmed. The cause of death was pneumonia, his daughter confirmed. His AI-generated likeness features as Father Fintan, a Catholic priest and Native American spiritualist, in the upcoming historical movie. “Don’t fear the dead, and don’t fear me,” the character says in the trailer.

ai.title: Google blocks over 483 million bad ads, suspends 1.7 million accounts in India in 2025
ai.description: Google took strong action against bad ads in India during 2025. The company blocked over 483 million ads and suspended 1.7 million advertiser accounts. Globally, more than 8.3 billion ads were removed. Google's AI, Gemini, significantly improved its ability to detect and stop deceptive advertising in real-time. This technology helped process user reports four times faster than the previous year.
